name: Essential Utilities, Inc.
description: Essential Utilities, Inc. is one of the largest publicly traded water, wastewater, and natural gas providers in the United States. Serving approximately 5 million people across nine states under the Aqua and Peoples brands, the company focuses on infrastructure renewal, regulatory compliance, and operational efficiency. With over 130 years of experience, Essential Utilities is dedicated to delivering safe and reliable services while prioritizing environmental stewardship and economic prosperity. The company operates as a holding company, committed to improving infrastructure to ensure the long-term reliability and safety of essential natural resources for the communities it serves.
